note: Do not instantiate directly; use itasca.dfn.template module functions.

methods.name: dipdirmax
methods.description: Get the template maximum dip direction in degrees.

methods.name: dipdirmin
methods.description: Get the template minimum dip direction in degrees.

methods.name: dipmax
methods.description: Get the template maximum dip in degrees.

methods.name: dipmin
methods.description: Get the template minimum dip in degrees.

methods.name: id
methods.description: Get the template id.

methods.name: name
methods.description: Get the template name.

methods.name: norientparam
methods.description: Get the template number of orientation parameters.

methods.name: nposparam
methods.description: Get the template number of position parameters.

methods.name: nsizeparam
methods.description: Get the template number of size parameters.

methods.name: orientparam
methods.description: Get a orientation parameter. The number of parameters can be assessed with the norientparam method.

methods.name: orienttype
methods.description: Get the template orientation type name. Acceptable values are uniform, gauss, powerlaw, bootstrapped, fish, fisher (3D only) and dips (3D only).

methods.name: posparam
methods.description: Get a position parameter. The number of parameters can be assessed with the nposparam method.

methods.name: postype
methods.description: Get the template orientation type name. Acceptable values are uniform, gauss, bootstrapped and fish.

methods.name: set_dipdirmax
methods.description: Set the template maximum dip direction in degrees.

methods.name: set_dipdirmin
methods.description: Set the template minimum dip direction in degrees.

methods.name: set_dipmax
methods.description: Set the template maximum dip in degrees.

methods.name: set_dipmin
methods.description: Set the template minimum dip in degrees.

methods.name: set_orientparam
methods.description: Set an orientation parameter. The parameter can be either a string or a float depending on the parameter. The number of parameters can be assessed with the norientparam method.

methods.name: set_orienttype
methods.description: Set the template orientation type name. Acceptable values are uniform, gauss, powerlaw, bootstrapped, fish, fisher (3D only) and dips (3D only).

methods.name: set_posparam
methods.description: Set a position parameter. The parameter can be either a string or a float depending on the parameter. The number of parameters can be assessed with the nposparam method.

methods.name: set_postype
methods.description: Set the template orientation type name. Acceptable values are uniform, gauss, bootstrapped and fish.

methods.name: set_sizemax
methods.description: Set the template maximum size. The fracture size is defined as the {fracture length in 2D; disk diameter in 3D}.

methods.name: set_sizemin
methods.description: Set the template minimum size. The fracture size is defined as the {fracture length in 2D; disk diameter in 3D}.

methods.name: set_sizeparam
methods.description: Set a size parameter. The parameter can be either a string or a float depending on the parameter. The number of parameters can be assessed with the nposparam method.

methods.name: set_sizetype
methods.description: Set the template size type name. Acceptable values are uniform, gauss, powerlaw, bootstrapped and fish.

methods.name: sizemax
methods.description: Get the template maximum size. The fracture size is defined as the {fracture length in 2D; disk diameter in 3D}.

methods.name: sizemin
methods.description: Get the template minimum size. The fracture size is defined as the {fracture length in 2D; disk diameter in 3D}.

methods.name: sizeparam
methods.description: Get a size parameter. The number of parameters can be assessed with the nsizeparam method.

methods.name: sizetype
methods.description: Get the template size type name. Acceptable values are uniform, gauss, powerlaw, bootstrapped and fish.
